Print Sheet: Strength - (Disarm, Grapple, Knock Down, or Pierce the Heart)
Eerie Presence: Cold, Unsettling Breeze follows you everywhere she goes.
Believes themselves possessed by a Demon.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
Keeping the Demon locked in. Until someone tries to tell you it's not there.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows: Believes themselves possessed by a Demon.

You were always a good child. Had good grades, loving parents, active in the community both at the neighborhood level and the parish at large. You went to church, threw beads from the Mardis Gras Floats, had nice friends. That's why it came as such a shock when you started hearing things. You wanted to go to the hospital, but your parents were skeptical, the things you said. It was Tongues, they said, you were Speaking in Tongues. But they loved you, and they took you anyway. The doctor said you were fine, nothing to be worried about, and recommended some anti-psychotics. But again, your parents were skeptical. They knew why the doctors couldn't find anything wrong with you. It was Demons. Probably got in your head from the music you were listening to. Or from when they last took you to the Quarter. Lots of little Hoodoo shops there. Just filled with who knows what. They tried the church proper, but the "no-good Lady Pastor from Atlanta" tried to say it didn't sound like the devil. That was alright, they had another friend, a Preacherman named Iago worked in their Krewe every Carnival, they tried to get in touch with him, but he was out of town "On Business," he said, but he'd send someone else right over. And send someone he did. A young man, dressed all correct and saying the scripture just like he should. He closed the door after your parents left the room and he sat on your bed, and he told you that there was going to be a ritual cleansing that would set you Free . But all he freed that day was the Demon. There was a cleansing alright. You were cleansed in the blood of Caine, in the blood of "Malkav," and then in the blood of your parents. Who were your first meal when the Demon was free. Before, it was only the occasional voice, and the odd thing that would slip out of your mouth. Now? It whispers to you almost every night, tells you secrets and dark truths you don't want to hear, and it makes you Strong. Stronger than ever you should be. You try to keep it contained. You've searched the country over for some method, some way to free yourself of it's demonic influence, and you've learned some things along the way. After you woke the first time, you found that you could read, understand, and speak Hebrew, (And before that, you were pretty sure you never even met a jewish person,) but it wasn't you, it was the Demon. And every single time you have to read, speak, or understand Hebrew, the Demon makes itself known, and the whispers start in something fierce. It's not all bad. You've got the demons strength in you. And The whispers have helped you on occasion. You can even use the demons powers to inflame the passions of others, and dyou're sure that with a little more practice, you could give someone a little glimpse of the demon, and send them running. But it's hard to look at crosses now. You feel it in you. Anytime you're confronted with a cross, or a church, the demon makes you flee in terror.  You miss being without it. But you ain't given up hope yet. If it takes you another thousand years, you'll find yourself a way to free yourself of the demon.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

Your overarching goal is to Exorcise yourself. To free yourself from the demon. Some tell you it's impossible. That you're not even possessed. That you will Never be free But that just makes the demon Angry.

Your demon is strong, but you've spent most of the time since you were possessed trying to find a way to free yourself of it. You know quite a lot about demons, and LA has had some trouble with them in the past. Surely there's someone here who knows how to banish one?
Protect Children. You were little more than a child yourself when you were possessed, and you can't bear the thought of the supernatural ruining anyone else's life who is so young.

rows: Has had discussion and connection with the Malkavina Primogen of SF and heard of a Hiriam, a homeless guy in the park who has seen visions of a red satellite in the sky. She also found Brian Ferguson is plotting to kidnap a JPL scientist and is looking into the mysterious case of Teddy Wolf and what happened to him. Her investigation of Dr. Case showed he was a well-educated and respected member of Los Angeles.

records.personal_plot_objects: Has had discussion and connection with the Malkavina Primogen of SF and heard of a Hiriam, a homeless guy in the park who has seen visions of a red satellite in the sky. She also found Brian Ferguson is plotting to kidnap a JPL scientist and is looking into the mysterious case of Teddy Wolf and what happened to him. Her investigation of Dr. Case showed he was a well-educated and respected member of Los Angeles.

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?
Feeding in my sect's domain (1 DT)
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.

I'm going to use Investigation + Computer to create a private database of L.A. kindred and their approximate haven location (down to street number or at least block). I want to build a census of the kindred in L.A. I'm aspiring for the Scourge position in the court and my primogen should (I hope!) have been in contact with clan coordinator or ST to get this to happen.
I spend an action forming a Herd (XP expenditure is in the XP section of this form). Patrons present at "Kinky's" a BDSM club in West Hollywood constitutes my herd.
I spend an action learning more computers. I take an advanced class concentrating in database creation and management.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Computer lv 2 (2xp), Herd lv 1 (2xp). I'm going to bank my extra 1xp for next time.

I'm going to call an all-Malks-on-deck meeting to mingle and asses the clan's strengths. The goal at the end of this rendezvous is that I'd like to have a list of of available in-clan talents, potential stars. This is a DT that I requested and roleplay never happened with Logan, so it's owed to me and I'll count it as an extra DT of the 4 I'm allowed to have. All my DT's here are in order of priority.

I want to find out more about Dr. Case. I'll use my investigation ability (3). This inquiry won't include following him, but asking around the kindred who have lived in L.A. much longer than me. I want to know as muuuuch as possible around him, always asking from a positive way... "Oh I met him and he seems a very knowledgeable scholar..." and then pose my questions in a "I'm just curious way". goal is to know if he is trustable. If he has betrayed people. Interests. Ambitions. He lived in L.A. before.

I need to find out who was Teddy the Malkavian. I need a one page on him. Positions in court, enemies, brief history, looks like he flipped... why? and what's the story on this beer of him that I have in my power and why Jonak (?) had the six-pack.
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.

The "computer" ability allows me to observe someone else's downtime. I want to observe one of the new Seneschal's DTs. Let me know if this needs a roll, but it seemes to be authomatic and unchallenged.

I contact the Malkavian primogen in SF to let him know I have information about archon Nakai that is going to live there now. And that if the prince wants to know what kind of ugly sewer crocodile is going to his court, we should have a chat. The ocassion is an opportunity to ask for his assistance in helping L.A. and garner his impression on the recent events in the Camarilla.
I'll save my current XP for next time. That means 4xp. That's all I have. please read the next section about expenditures not reflected on my sheet.
Old XPs that I've asked everyone to please update in my sheet!!! Streetwise 1 (2xp), Security 1 (2xp), Influence 1 ->underworld->Organized crime (2XP), Obfuscate (6xp)
